case_title: CORDOVA XIMENA VS KIM CASEY SU-UNG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CORDOVA XIMENA AS TO DEFENDANT KIM CASEY SU-UNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDOVA XIMENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM CASEY SU-UNG $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
